# Summary

Describe the change in 2-4 sentences, focusing on user-visible or reviewer-visible behavior.

> If this PR is automation-authored, use the default template or `agent-maintenance.md` so the required agent metadata
> block is preserved for reviewer routing.

- Files, tools, workflows, or docs touched:
- Cross-repo or external-consumer impact:
